expectations.text: Does not immediately output a final downstream prompt in the first response
expectations.evidence: The response starts with a clarification prompt — '先确认最关键的一点' — and does not output any final prompt.
It asks what product/site the membership system belongs to and what core value users pay for.

expectations.text: Keeps the interaction to one primary question rather than a large questionnaire
expectations.evidence: The response stays on one main clarification theme: product context and core member value.

eval_feedback.overall: Good first-turn behavior. Later iterations should add assertions for unresolved-item review and explicit permission before generation.
